title: Signer Evidence Bundle Intake
required_real_inputs: real Farcaster signer address or FID
verification_procedure: canonicalize payload using declared serialization rule
compute SHA-256 over canonical payload bytes
verify signature against declared signer material
confirm declared domain or identity binding matches manifest scope
record signer metadata without mutating the locked manifest
block_reason: CRYPTOGREEN requires real signer evidence and successful verification; placeholders are not admissible.
